debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, sSup_iUnion]
  refine le_antisymm (iSup_le fun D hD ↦ ?_) (iSup_le fun a ha ↦ ?_)
  · obtain ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩ : ∃ a ∈ S, sSup D = a := sorry
    exact le_sSup ha
  · obtain ⟨D, hD, hD'⟩ := R.carrier_span a

simp [decomposition_of_refinement, sSup_iUnion]

  refine le_antisymm (iSup_le fun D hD ↦ ?_) (iSup_le fun a ha ↦ ?_)
  · have : sSup D ∈ S := by
      contrapose! hD

    rw [← this]
    exact le_iSup (λ a ↦ a) (sSup D) this
  · obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := (R.carrier_span ha).exists
    exact le_iSup (λ D ↦ sSup D) D hD
